---
title: "Policy Image"
format: html
---

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Policy Reform Pathway</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --navy: #1a3a5f;
            --amber: #f39c12;
            --teal: #16a085;
            --light-gray: #f4f7f6;
            --border-color: #d1d8e0;
            --text-dark: #2c3e50;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
            background-color: #fff;
            color: var(--text-dark);
            margin: 40px;
        }

        h1 {
            text-align: center;
            color: var(--navy);
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
        }

        .infographic-container {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 20px;
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: stretch;
        }

        /* Columns */
        .phase-column {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .header-label {
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: white;
            padding: 10px;
            text-align: center;
            border-radius: 5px;
            min-height: 40px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* Color Coding for Layers */
        .bg-navy { background-color: var(--navy); }
        .bg-amber { background-color: var(--amber); }
        .bg-teal { background-color: var(--teal); }

        /* Content Blocks */
        .block {
            padding: 15px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 8px;
            background-color: var(--light-gray);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.4;
            position: relative;
        }

        .block.highlight {
            border: 2px solid var(--navy);
            background-color: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        .block.barrier {
            border-left: 5px solid var(--amber);
        }

        .block.solution {
            border-left: 5px solid var(--teal);
        }

        ul {
            margin: 5px 0 0 18px;
            padding: 0;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .connector {
            text-align: center;
            color: var(--navy);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }

        /* Decorative Arrows for Flow */
        .phase-column:not(:last-child)::after {
            content: '➔';
            position: absolute;
            right: -15px;
            top: 50%;
            color: var(--border-color);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .infographic-container { position: relative; }

        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .infographic-container { flex-direction: column; }
            .phase-column:not(:last-child)::after { content: '↓'; bottom: -15px; top: auto; right: 50%; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <h1>Academic-Community Partnership: From Proof of Concept to Policy Reform</h1>

    <div class="infographic-container">
        
        <!-- Phase 1: Context -->
        <div class="phase-column">
            <div class="header-label bg-navy">1. POLICY CONTEXT</div>
            <div class="block">
                <strong>Existing Initiatives:</strong>
                <ul>
                    <li>Healthy Aging and SDOH Efforts</li>
                    <li>Age-Friendly Health Systems</li>
                    <li>CMS GUIDE Model</li>
                    <li>Medicare Diabetes Prevention</li>
                    <li>Social Prescribing Movement</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Phase 2: Practice Model -->
        <div class="phase-column">
            <div class="header-label bg-navy">2. PROVEN PRACTICE MODEL</div>
            <div class="connector">↓</div>
            <div class="block highlight">
                <strong>Academic-Community Partnership</strong>
                <strong>Clinical-Community Partnership</strong>
                <p style="margin: 10px 0; font-weight: bold; color: var(--navy);">MyHealthIowa + Iowa Community HUB</p>
                <p>Demonstrated success in bridging clinical care and community resources.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Phase 3: Gaps -->
        <div class="phase-column">
            <div class="header-label bg-amber">3.POLICY GAPS</div>
            <div class="block barrier"><strong>Gap 1:</strong> Financing Misalignment</div>
            <div class="block barrier"><strong>Gap 2:</strong> Fragmented Systems</div>
            <div class="block barrier"><strong>Gap 3:</strong> Workforce Limitations</div>
            <div class="block barrier"><strong>Gap 4:</strong> Infrastructure Deficits</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Phase 4: Recommendations -->
        <div class="phase-column">
            <div class="header-label bg-teal">4. POLICY RECOMMENDATIONS</div>
            <div class="block solution">
                <strong>R1 & R3:</strong> Sustainable Reimbursement and CCH Integration
            </div>
            <div class="block solution">
                <strong>R2:</strong> Academic–Community Partnerships through Federal Investment
            </div>
            <div class="block solution">
                <strong>R4:</strong> Diversity and Community-Based Training
            </div>
            <div class="block solution">
                <strong>R5:</strong> Equity-Focused National Quality Metrics
            </div>
        </div>

    </div>

    <p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 40px; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #7f8c8d;">
        <em>Figure 1: Simplified pathway mapping the transition from identified community models to national policy reform.</em>
    </p>

</body>
</html>
